name: YieldPilot
one_liner: AI agent that automatically rebalances DeFi positions across Sui protocols to maximize yield.
sui_advantage: PTBs enable complex multi-protocol rebalancing in a single atomic transaction, eliminating partial execution risk during yield optimization.

name: ArbiBot
one_liner: Cross-DEX arbitrage bot that exploits price differences across Sui decentralized exchanges.
sui_advantage: PTBs execute multi-hop arbitrage across multiple DEXs in one atomic transaction, Sui's sub-second finality minimizes missed opportunities.

name: LiquidGuard
one_liner: Liquidation protection bot that monitors positions and auto-deleverages before liquidation thresholds.
sui_advantage: Monitors lending protocol shared objects in real-time, uses PTBs to atomically repay debt and withdraw collateral to avoid liquidation penalties.

name: DCABot
one_liner: Dollar-cost averaging bot that executes scheduled purchases across Sui tokens with optimal routing.
sui_advantage: PTBs split large orders across multiple liquidity sources atomically, DeepBook integration for limit orders, sponsored transactions for gas-free DCA.

name: PortfolioAgent
one_liner: AI portfolio manager that maintains target allocations by automatically rebalancing based on market conditions.
sui_advantage: Reads all owned objects to assess current portfolio, PTBs rebalance across multiple tokens in one transaction, DeepBook for execution.

name: MEVShield
one_liner: Anti-MEV agent that protects user transactions from front-running using optimal transaction timing.
sui_advantage: Sui's DAG-based consensus and object-level parallelism reduce MEV surface, agent optimizes transaction submission timing and gas pricing.

name: LPManager
one_liner: Liquidity position manager that auto-adjusts concentrated liquidity ranges based on price action.
sui_advantage: PTBs atomically remove liquidity, adjust ranges, and re-add in one transaction; monitors DeepBook orderbook depth for optimal range selection.

name: LendingOptimizer
one_liner: Agent that moves lending positions between protocols to always capture the highest supply APY.
sui_advantage: PTBs withdraw from one protocol and deposit into another atomically, monitors lending pool shared objects for real-time rate changes.

name: StakingAgent
one_liner: Validator staking optimizer that redistributes stake across validators for maximum APY and decentralization.
sui_advantage: Reads Sui validator staking objects to compare performance, PTBs redistribute stake across multiple validators atomically per epoch.

name: GridTrader
one_liner: Grid trading bot that places limit orders at predefined intervals on DeepBook for passive income.
sui_advantage: DeepBook's on-chain orderbook enables native limit orders, PTBs place multiple grid orders in one transaction, sub-second fills.

name: FlashLoanBot
one_liner: Flash loan arbitrage bot that identifies and executes profitable flash loan opportunities on Sui.
sui_advantage: PTBs enable flash loan borrow, multi-step arbitrage, and repayment all within a single atomic transaction block.

name: HedgeBot
one_liner: Automated hedging agent that maintains delta-neutral positions using perpetuals and spot markets.
sui_advantage: PTBs atomically open perpetual positions while adjusting spot holdings, DeepBook for spot execution, real-time monitoring of funding rates.

name: AirdropHunter
one_liner: Agent that identifies potential airdrop opportunities and maintains qualifying activity across Sui protocols.
sui_advantage: Tracks interaction history via Sui objects, uses PTBs to efficiently interact with multiple protocols, monitors new package deployments for early participation.

name: VaultManager
one_liner: Automated vault strategy agent that manages complex multi-protocol yield farming strategies.
sui_advantage: PTBs compose deposits, staking, and reinvestment across protocols in single transactions, shared vault objects enable pooled strategies.

name: OTCAgent
one_liner: OTC trading agent that matches large block trades off-exchange with minimal slippage.
sui_advantage: PTBs execute large multi-step OTC settlements atomically, Seal encrypts trade negotiation details, DeepBook provides price reference.

name: InsuranceBot
one_liner: Agent that automatically purchases DeFi insurance coverage when position risk exceeds thresholds.
sui_advantage: Monitors position health via shared objects, PTBs purchase coverage and adjust positions atomically, cost-benefit analysis of Sui-native insurance protocols.

name: TaxHarvester
one_liner: Tax-loss harvesting bot that sells losing positions and buys correlated assets to optimize tax liability.
sui_advantage: PTBs sell losing positions and purchase replacements atomically in one transaction, tracks cost basis via Sui object history.

name: FundingRateBot
one_liner: Funding rate arbitrage bot that captures spreads between perpetual and spot markets.
sui_advantage: PTBs open hedged positions across spot and perp markets atomically, Sui's speed captures funding rate changes quickly.

name: CollateralBot
one_liner: Collateral management agent that optimizes collateral usage across multiple lending positions.
sui_advantage: PTBs move collateral between protocols atomically, monitors collateral ratios via shared objects, Sui's parallelism enables fast rebalancing.

name: TokenLaunchBot
one_liner: Automated token launch agent that manages liquidity bootstrapping, market making, and initial distribution.
sui_advantage: PTBs handle token minting, liquidity provision, and initial distribution in one atomic launch transaction, DeepBook for orderbook listing.

name: CommunityBot
one_liner: AI community manager that welcomes new members, answers FAQs, and escalates complex issues to human moderators.
sui_advantage: Reads on-chain membership objects to personalize interactions, uses sponsored transactions to gift welcome NFTs, tracks engagement via dynamic fields.

name: ContentCurator
one_liner: AI agent that curates and ranks content based on quality signals, engagement, and user preferences.
sui_advantage: Reads content objects and engagement metrics from Sui, creates curated feed objects with dynamic fields, Walrus-stored content analysis.

name: ModeratorAI
one_liner: Content moderation agent that flags harmful content and enforces community guidelines transparently.
sui_advantage: Moderation decisions are recorded as Sui objects for transparency and appeal, PTBs handle flagging and content hiding atomically.

name: EngageBot
one_liner: Engagement optimization agent that identifies the best times and content types to maximize community interaction.
sui_advantage: Analyzes on-chain engagement data from Sui objects, schedules content posts via sponsored transactions, tracks metrics via dynamic fields.

name: ReputationAgent
one_liner: Agent that computes and updates reputation scores based on on-chain activity and community contributions.
sui_advantage: Reads all Sui objects owned by an address to build comprehensive activity profiles, updates reputation objects via dynamic fields.

name: TranslatorBot
one_liner: Real-time translation agent for global communities that translates messages and documentation across languages.
sui_advantage: Translation objects stored on Walrus, message objects updated with dynamic fields for translations, sponsored transactions for free community translation.

name: EventBot
one_liner: Community event management agent that schedules, promotes, and manages attendance for virtual and IRL events.
sui_advantage: Event objects with dynamic fields track RSVPs and attendance, PTBs handle ticket distribution, sponsored transactions for free RSVP.

name: OnboardBot
one_liner: Onboarding agent that guides new users through Sui ecosystem with interactive tutorials and rewards.
sui_advantage: Uses zkLogin for frictionless signup, sponsors first transactions, mints progress NFTs via PTBs, tracks completion via dynamic fields.

name: PollBot
one_liner: Community polling agent that creates, distributes, and tallies on-chain votes with anti-sybil protections.
sui_advantage: Poll objects as shared resources handle concurrent votes, PTBs record votes atomically, SuiNS-based identity for sybil resistance.

name: AmbassadorBot
one_liner: Ambassador program manager that tracks contributions, distributes rewards, and ranks community ambassadors.
sui_advantage: Ambassador profile objects with dynamic fields track all contributions, PTBs distribute tiered rewards, reputation objects are composable across programs.

name: SummaryBot
one_liner: Conversation summarizer that creates daily digests of community discussions and stores them as searchable archives.
sui_advantage: Summary objects stored on Walrus with Sui object references for searchability, dynamic fields tag key topics, sponsored transactions for archival.

name: TipDistributor
one_liner: Automated tip distribution agent that rewards quality content creators based on community voting and engagement.
sui_advantage: PTBs distribute tips from a community pool to multiple creators in one atomic transaction, engagement tracked via Sui object interactions.

name: AntiSpamBot
one_liner: Spam detection agent that identifies and quarantines spam across Sui social platforms using ML models.
sui_advantage: Analyzes transaction patterns and object creation rates unique to Sui, quarantine actions recorded as transparent Sui objects for appeals.

name: InfluencerAgent
one_liner: Influencer analytics agent that tracks on-chain impact, engagement quality, and audience authenticity.
sui_advantage: Analyzes Sui object ownership patterns to identify genuine vs bot followers, tracks real engagement via on-chain interactions.

name: DAOSecretary
one_liner: DAO management agent that drafts proposals, tracks quorum, and executes approved actions automatically.
sui_advantage: Reads DAO shared objects for proposal status, PTBs execute approved proposals atomically, tracks voting via dynamic fields on proposal objects.

name: ResearchBot
one_liner: On-chain research assistant that analyzes Sui protocols, tokenomics, and market dynamics to generate reports.
sui_advantage: Reads Sui shared objects to analyze real protocol state, tracks historical object changes for trend analysis, Walrus stores generated reports.

name: MarketAnalyzer
one_liner: Market analysis agent that identifies trends, correlations, and trading signals from on-chain Sui data.
sui_advantage: Analyzes DeepBook orderbook data and DEX volumes in real-time, tracks token flow patterns via Sui object transfers.

name: SentimentTracker
one_liner: Sentiment analysis agent that correlates social media sentiment with on-chain trading activity on Sui.
sui_advantage: Correlates sentiment signals with Sui DEX volumes and price action, tracks whale movements during sentiment shifts, stores analysis on Walrus.

name: NewsAggregator
one_liner: Sui ecosystem news aggregator that curates, summarizes, and delivers relevant updates from multiple sources.
sui_advantage: News digest objects stored on Walrus with Sui object references for verifiable sourcing, sponsored delivery to subscriber objects.

name: AlphaFinder
one_liner: Alpha discovery agent that identifies new Sui projects, token launches, and emerging opportunities early.
sui_advantage: Monitors Sui package publish events for new protocols, analyzes early object creation patterns, tracks developer activity metrics.

name: RiskAnalyzer
one_liner: DeFi risk assessment agent that scores protocol safety based on code quality, TVL stability, and audit status.
sui_advantage: Analyzes Move bytecode for vulnerability patterns, monitors shared object TVL changes, tracks upgrade cap ownership for governance risk.

name: TokenomicsBot
one_liner: Tokenomics analysis agent that models supply schedules, inflation rates, and token distribution for Sui projects.
sui_advantage: Reads Sui Coin treasury cap objects for supply data, tracks token distribution across owned objects, models vesting schedules from on-chain data.

name: OnChainSleuth
one_liner: Investigation agent that traces fund flows and identifies connected wallets for compliance and research.
sui_advantage: Traces Sui object ownership chains, identifies address clusters through shared object interactions and PTB co-signers.

name: MetricsBot
one_liner: Ecosystem metrics agent that tracks and reports daily Sui network KPIs like active addresses, transactions, and TVL.
sui_advantage: Monitors Sui checkpoint data for network metrics, tracks unique object interactions, measures zkLogin adoption and sponsored transaction usage.

name: CompetitorTracker
one_liner: Cross-chain comparison agent that benchmarks Sui metrics against other L1s for ecosystem health assessment.
sui_advantage: Highlights Sui-specific advantages like PTB usage, zkLogin adoption, and object model efficiency in cross-chain comparisons.

name: GovernanceWatcher
one_liner: Governance monitoring agent that tracks proposals, votes, and outcomes across Sui DAOs and protocols.
sui_advantage: Monitors DAO shared objects for new proposals, tracks voting power distribution via staked object analysis, alerts on governance attacks.

name: GasReporter
one_liner: Gas analytics agent that reports on gas usage patterns, identifies expensive operations, and suggests optimizations.
sui_advantage: Breaks down Sui gas into computation, storage, and non-refundable components, identifies expensive dynamic field operations and suggests alternatives.

name: NFTValuator
one_liner: NFT valuation agent that estimates prices based on trait rarity, historical sales, and market conditions.
sui_advantage: Reads NFT dynamic fields for trait analysis, tracks Kiosk marketplace sales history, monitors collection-level metrics via object queries.

name: WhaleAlert
one_liner: Whale movement alert agent that notifies users when large holders make significant on-chain moves.
sui_advantage: Monitors large SUI and token object transfers in real-time via Sui event subscriptions, tracks validator stake changes per epoch.

name: ProtocolDigest
one_liner: Weekly protocol digest agent that summarizes key changes, upgrades, and metrics for Sui DeFi protocols.
sui_advantage: Tracks Sui package upgrade events, analyzes TVL changes in shared objects, monitors new function additions in protocol modules.

name: BookkeeperBot
one_liner: Automated crypto bookkeeping agent that categorizes transactions and maintains accounting ledgers.
sui_advantage: Parses Sui PTB transaction structure to categorize complex multi-step operations, tracks object-level cost basis, handles gas rebate accounting.

name: TaxAgent
one_liner: Crypto tax reporting agent that generates jurisdiction-specific tax reports from on-chain transaction history.
sui_advantage: Reconstructs complete transaction history from Sui object ownership changes, handles DeFi-specific tax events from PTB analysis.

name: InvoiceBot
one_liner: Invoice management agent that creates, sends, and tracks crypto invoices with automatic payment matching.
sui_advantage: Invoice objects on Sui with PTBs for atomic invoice creation and payment matching, SuiNS for professional sender identity.

name: PayrollBot
one_liner: Crypto payroll agent that handles recurring salary payments, tax withholding, and multi-currency distribution.
sui_advantage: PTBs distribute payroll to all employees in one atomic transaction, handles multi-token payments, schedules recurring payments per epoch.

name: ExpenseTracker
one_liner: Team expense tracking agent that monitors shared wallet spending and enforces budget policies.
sui_advantage: Monitors multi-sig wallet shared objects for transactions, categorizes spending via PTB analysis, enforces Move-based spending policies.

name: GrantManager
one_liner: Grant management agent that tracks milestones, manages fund disbursement, and generates progress reports.
sui_advantage: Grant objects with milestone dynamic fields, PTBs release funds upon milestone verification, Walrus stores progress reports.

name: ContractBot
one_liner: Smart contract management agent that tracks deployments, upgrades, and object ownership across environments.
sui_advantage: Monitors Sui package objects, tracks upgrade cap ownership, alerts on unauthorized upgrades, maintains deployment registry via dynamic fields.

name: MeetingBot
one_liner: DAO meeting coordinator that schedules calls, records minutes on-chain, and tracks action items.
sui_advantage: Meeting minutes stored on Walrus with Sui object references, action item objects track completion via dynamic fields, attendance as on-chain attestations.

name: ReportGen
one_liner: Automated report generator that creates treasury, activity, and performance reports for DAOs and protocols.
sui_advantage: Reads DAO treasury shared objects for financial data, analyzes protocol activity via Sui events, stores reports on Walrus with on-chain attestation.

name: ComplianceBot
one_liner: Regulatory compliance agent that monitors transactions for reporting requirements and generates compliance documentation.
sui_advantage: Analyzes Sui transaction patterns for regulatory triggers, generates reports from on-chain data, Seal encrypts sensitive compliance documents.

name: NFTCreator
one_liner: AI art generation agent that creates, mints, and lists NFT collections on Sui marketplaces.
sui_advantage: PTBs batch-mint entire collections in minimal transactions, Walrus stores generated art, Kiosk objects for marketplace listing.

name: ContentWriter
one_liner: AI content creation agent that writes, publishes, and monetizes articles on decentralized platforms.
sui_advantage: Articles stored on Walrus as permanent content, article objects on Sui track readership and revenue, PTBs handle publish-and-monetize atomically.

name: MusicMaker
one_liner: AI music production agent that generates tracks, mints as NFTs, and distributes royalties to collaborators.
sui_advantage: Music files on Walrus, royalty split objects with dynamic fields for each collaborator, PTBs distribute streaming revenue atomically.

name: DesignAgent
one_liner: AI design assistant that generates logos, banners, and brand assets stored as licensable NFTs.
sui_advantage: Design assets stored on Walrus, license objects on Sui with usage terms in dynamic fields, PTBs handle purchase-and-license-grant atomically.

name: AvatarForge
one_liner: AI avatar generation agent that creates personalized profile pictures and evolving digital identities.
sui_advantage: Avatar NFTs with dynamic fields that evolve based on on-chain activity, Walrus stores generated images, composable across Sui dApps.

name: StoryWeaver
one_liner: Collaborative storytelling agent that generates narrative branches based on community votes and contributions.
sui_advantage: Story chapter objects form a branching tree using parent-child relationships, community votes via shared objects determine narrative direction.

name: VideoEditor
one_liner: AI video editing agent that processes, enhances, and publishes video content to decentralized platforms.
sui_advantage: Raw and processed videos stored on Walrus, edit history tracked as Sui objects, PTBs handle publish-and-monetize workflows.

name: MemeGenerator
one_liner: AI meme creation agent that generates trending memes, mints them, and manages community meme competitions.
sui_advantage: Memes stored on Walrus, meme NFTs with dynamic fields tracking virality, PTBs batch-mint competition entries, on-chain voting for winners.

name: 3DAssetBot
one_liner: AI 3D model generation agent that creates game-ready assets and metaverse wearables as NFTs.
sui_advantage: 3D models on Walrus, asset NFTs composable across Sui games, dynamic fields store LOD variants and compatibility metadata.

name: SoundscapeBot
one_liner: AI ambient sound generator that creates soundscapes for meditation, focus, and gaming environments.
sui_advantage: Audio stored on Walrus, soundscape NFTs with dynamic fields for customization parameters, composable with gaming and wellness dApps.

name: WalletGuard
one_liner: Wallet security agent that monitors transactions, flags suspicious activity, and enforces spending policies.
sui_advantage: Monitors all object changes for an address, analyzes PTB structure for malicious patterns, can auto-revoke permissions via sponsored transactions.

name: GasOptimizer
one_liner: Transaction gas optimization agent that restructures PTBs for minimal gas consumption.
sui_advantage: Analyzes Sui PTB structure and reorders operations for optimal gas usage, batches multiple user intents into single PTBs, leverages gas rebates.

name: BatchProcessor
one_liner: Transaction batching agent that combines multiple user operations into efficient PTBs.
sui_advantage: Sui's PTBs uniquely allow composing multiple operations into single transactions, this agent maximizes batching efficiency across user intents.

name: NotifyBot
one_liner: On-chain notification agent that watches for specific events and delivers alerts via multiple channels.
sui_advantage: Subscribes to Sui event streams with Move type-level filtering, monitors object state changes, delivers via push notifications, email, or Telegram.

name: ObjectCleaner
one_liner: Wallet cleanup agent that identifies and removes unwanted objects, reclaiming storage rebates.
sui_advantage: Scans owned objects for dust tokens, spam NFTs, and unused objects; uses PTBs to batch-delete objects and reclaim Sui storage rebates.

name: SchedulerBot
one_liner: Transaction scheduling agent that executes pre-defined transactions at specific times or conditions.
sui_advantage: Creates condition-based triggers that execute PTBs when on-chain state matches criteria, leverages Sui's fast finality for timely execution.

name: MigrationBot
one_liner: Asset migration agent that helps users move tokens and NFTs from other chains to Sui.
sui_advantage: PTBs handle bridge unwrapping and asset organization in one transaction, zkLogin connects existing identities, guides through Sui-specific features.

name: ApprovalBot
one_liner: Token approval management agent that tracks and revokes unnecessary token approvals for security.
sui_advantage: Sui's object model means approvals work differently than EVM; agent manages capability objects and shared object access patterns for security.

name: DomainManager
one_liner: SuiNS domain management agent that handles registration, renewal, and subdomain configuration.
sui_advantage: Manages SuiNS name objects, auto-renews expiring domains, configures subdomains for team members, monitors domain marketplace for deals.

name: MultiSigCoord
one_liner: Multi-sig coordination agent that proposes transactions, collects signatures, and executes when threshold is met.
sui_advantage: Leverages Sui's native multi-sig support, constructs PTBs for proposal, tracks signature collection, executes complex multi-step operations atomically.
